jobs.justification: O candidato Guilherme Maia possui experiência sólida e direta nos principais requisitos da vaga de Delivery Manager Core Technology Platform. Ele tem histórico comprovado de liderança em organizações lideradas por engenharia, aplicando métodos ágeis modernos como Scrum e Kanban. Sua experiência em gerenciar a entrega de serviços tecnológicos fundamentais, como infraestrutura, dados e engenharia de plataforma, é um ótimo ajuste para o domínio desta vaga. Ele também demonstra profundo entendimento de gerenciamento de incidentes e manutenção de níveis de serviço, além de liderança em QA e automação estratégica. Suas habilidades de pensamento crítico e influência sem autoridade direta também se alinham perfeitamente com as necessidades desta posição. Em resumo, o candidato possui um ajuste excelente e experiência direta no domínio central da vaga.
jobs.main_gap: Não há gaps significativos identificados no perfil do candidato em relação aos requisitos da vaga.

core_requirements.evidence: Experience leading incident response and post-mortems to ensure rapid resolution and continuous reliability improvements, as evidenced in the TPM role

core_requirements.evidence: Demonstrated ability to navigate complex dependencies, align cross-divisional priorities, and drive consensus across teams with differing objectives, as described in the profile

Isso atende plenamente aos requisitos centrais da vaga. Ele também demonstra habilidades em liderança de entrega de produto, uso de dados e análise, alinhamento com stakeholders, e familiaridade com produtos e plataformas digitais. Portanto, o candidato é um ótimo fit para a vaga de Product Manager na Orium.

core_requirements.requirement: Equally comfortable in the weeds of project execution and at the whiteboard shaping account strategy

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui experiência relevante em gestão de programas e projetos, transformação operacional e análise de dados, demonstrando grande parte das habilidades exigidas para a função. No entanto, a vaga solicita um nível de seniority um pouco acima do perfil atual do candidato, que possui aproximadamente 3-4 anos de experiência em PM/TPM, enquanto a vaga provavelmente exija 5+ anos. Apesar do gap de seniority, o candidato ainda se apresenta como uma opção viável para a posição, com risco moderado.
scored_jobs.main_gap: O principal gap é a falta de experiência específica na área de People Operations, que é o domínio central da vaga.

core_requirements.evidence: Proven track record in building and leading operational capabilities, with specific focus on workforce planning, service delivery, and global scaling, as shown in previous Program/Project Management roles.

core_requirements.requirement: Design and lead the mandatory, centralized "Front Door" for all work entering the Global People Operations team. Ensure every initiative is vetted for operational feasibility and capacity alignment before it is accepted into the team's roadmap.
core_requirements.evidence: Experience in building and leading centralized intake and governance processes to prioritize and manage operational work, as demonstrated in roles like TPM and PM.

core_requirements.requirement: Partner with People+ COEs, Strategy & Enablement, Process Optimization, Solutions, and Tech teams to ensure operational readiness for high-priority initiatives. Act as the primary operational interface, translating broad strategy into actionable delivery plans.
core_requirements.evidence: Track record of cross-functional collaboration and translating strategic vision into operational plans, as shown in roles like PO, TPM, and PM.

core_requirements.requirement: Aggregate monitoring data across all tiers to identify trends and root causes; use these insights to support global prioritization and identify where to double-down on automation to drive down manual effort.
core_requirements.evidence: Proficiency in data analysis, including SQL, Python, and Spark/Scala, to derive insights from operational data and drive continuous improvement, as demonstrated in previous roles.

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui uma sólida experiência em gerenciamento de produto, programa e projeto, incluindo PO, TPM e PM, o que demonstra um bom ajuste com as principais habilidades necessárias para a vaga. Entretanto, ele possui apenas ~3-4 anos de experiência em funções de PM/TPM em tecnologia, ficando aquém dos 5+ anos exigidos pela vaga. Apesar da forte experiência transferível, esse gap de senioridade é um fator limitante, reduzindo o score máximo permitido para 65.

eliminated_jobs.title: Sr. Business Operations Manager, CN Expansion, CN Expansion
eliminated_jobs.jd_full: Sr. Business Operations Manager, CN ExpansionThe mission of Amazon Global Selling (AGS) is to enable vast global selection on Amazon's WW Stores through recruiting and supporting quality and compliant Sellers from anywhere around the world.Today, CN Global Selling (CNGS) supports millions of China Sellers for their success on up to 20 Amazon worldwide marketplaces including US, CA, EU, JP, AU, IN etc. Your and your team's responsibilities revolve around three main areas: driving analytical insights, developing business plans, and working collaboratively with cross-functional teams.I. Analytical Insights:- Conduct deep-dive analyses to uncover key success drivers and obstacles, focusing on both Seller and Sales behavior.- Share data-driven insights with stakeholders from China and international teams.II. Sales Operations - Develop and execute 3-year strategy and annual business plans and strategic initiatives- Ensure operational practices are fully compliant with legislation and policy through monitoring, accountability, auditing, and reviewing all practices- Manage and drive staffing plans, schedules, quality initiatives, performance levels, and process change initiativesIII. Cross-Functional Collaboration- Serve as operational leadership stakeholder in implementing new program elements in partnership with design and development teams- Coordinate with sales organizations globally, Product teams, and Category teams- Relay market needs and requirements back to internal Amazon teams, including Product, Technical, and Category Management teams- Collaborate with senior leadership on strategic initiatives and business planningIV. Program Management & Execution- Contribute to operational deployment plans outlining critical and best practice launch activities- Conduct new program initiative readiness assessments and establish goals and success indicators- Drive seller satisfaction by delivering high levels of service through strategic insights and operational standards- Build and execute strategic joint business plans with sellers to explore innovative ways to identify and execute new selection, merchandising, and operational improvement opportunitiesIf you are passionate about working in a fast-paced, innovative environment, willing to embrace challenges, make history, and have fun, please apply for this position!Key job responsibilitiesYour daily responsibilities include but not limited to :1. Strategy and Execution:-Own and develop New Seller recruiting/success strategy and execution plan within the New Seller Recruitment Organization.-Collaborate with internal (Marketing, tech, central PM teams) and external (global product, marketplace teams) stakeholders to drive Seller experience improvement and growth success.3. Monitoring and Goal Setting:-Monitor Seller registration to on-boarding experience and efficiency.-Share goals with global and local PMO teams to enhance the experience and throughput.4. Operational Processes:-Build, monitor, and create operational processes and mechanisms that support global selling, new seller recruitment, and seller success.-Partner with the China operations team to implement processes that benefit Account Manager team's efficiency, process adherence, and more.-Collaborate with the Central Global team to influence changes for improved operational efficiency and resource allocation strategy.-Land global initiatives into local operational processes.5.Business Reviews and Strategy Planning:-Drive regular business reviews with stakeholders.-Contribute to strategy planning.Basic Qualifications- 10+ years of Microsoft Excel experience- Bachelor's degree or equivalent- Experience developing and implementing systems/tools utilized for CRM, variable compensation, revenue reporting, forecasting, Salesforce automation, etc.- Experience defining, refining and implementing sales processes, procedures and policies or equivalentPreferred Qualifications- Experience with SQL- Experience presenting to senior leadershipOur inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

eliminated_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager Android
eliminated_jobs.jd_full:
All roles at JumpCloud are Remote unless otherwise specified in the Job Description.

About JumpCloud

JumpCloud® delivers a unified open directory platform that makes it easy to securely manage identities, devices, and access across your organization. With JumpCloud®, IT teams and MSPs enable users to work securely from anywhere and manage their Windows, Apple, Linux, and Android devices from a single platform. JumpCloud® is IT Simplified.

Overview

As a Sr. Product Manager for Android MDM at JumpCloud, you will lead the evolution of the Android management platform within a unified “open directory”. Unlike standalone MDM tools, this role focuses on treating the device as a critical extension of a user’s identity, ensuring that Android endpoints are seamlessly integrated into JumpCloud’s broader identity, access, and security stack.

Job Summary

The Product Manager, Android MDM owns the roadmap for JumpCloud’s Android Enterprise Mobility Management (EMM). You will be responsible for bridging the gap between native Android capabilities and JumpCloud’s core pillars: Identity, Access, and Device Management. Your goal is to provide IT admins with a single console to manage Android devices alongside Windows, Mac, and Linux systems, all while leveraging JumpCloud’s unique conditional access and SSO capabilities.

Why This Role is Different at JumpCloud

At JumpCloud, you aren’t just managing a device; you are securing a “gateway to resources”. You will contribute to a platform that displaces legacy systems by offering a single, cloud-native source of truth for an organization’s entire IT infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities & Integration into the JumpCloud Stack

  • Unified Device Strategy: Define the roadmap for Android management that aligns with JumpCloud’s cross-OS vision, ensuring parity and ease of use across all managed endpoints.
  • Identity-Centric Management: Integrate Android device posture into JumpCloud’s Conditional Access policies, allowing admins to grant or deny access to resources based on whether an Android device is encrypted or compliant.
  • Zero-Touch & Lifecycle Automation: Own the end-to-end lifecycle for Android devices, from Zero-Touch enrollment to automated offboarding, triggered directly by JumpCloud’s Directory Insights and user lifecycle events.
  • Managed Google Play Integration: Lead the development of software management features that allow admins to curate and deploy private and public apps through the Managed Google Play Store.
  • Security & Compliance Enforcement: Design policies for Work Profiles (BYOD) and Fully Managed (COPE) scenarios that enforce JumpCloud’s security standards, such as mandatory MFA and full-disk encryption.
  • Cross-Functional Platform Collaboration: Work with the Identity and Directory teams to ensure Android devices are automatically grouped and managed based on user attributes (Attribute-Based Access Control)

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Experience: 5+ years in Product Management, with at least 3 years focused on Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) or MDM.
  • Deep Android Expertise: Technical mastery of the Android Enterprise (EMM) ecosystem, including enrollment methods (QR, Zero-Touch), DPC (Device Policy Controller), and Work Profiles.
  • Platform Thinking: Experience building products that must integrate into a larger platform ecosystem (SaaS, Identity, or Directory Services).
  • Security Mindset: Familiarity with Zero Trust security models and how device health informs access decisions.
  • Analytical & Customer-Driven: Proven ability to use Directory Insights and customer feedback to prioritize features in a fast-paced agile environment.
  • Communication: Strong ability to articulate complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders and leadership

#LI-PD1

Where you’ll be working/Location:

JumpCloud is committed to being Remote First, meaning that you are able to work remotely within the country noted in the Job Description.

This role is remote in the country of Turkey / Türkiye. You must be located in and authorized to work in Turkey / Türkiye to be considered for this role.

Language:

JumpCloud® has teams in 15+ countries around the world and conducts our internal business in English. The interview and any additional screening process will take place primarily in English. To be considered for a role at JumpCloud®, you will be required to speak and write in English fluently.  Any additional language requirements will be included in the details of the job description.

Why JumpCloud?

If you thrive working in a fast, SaaS-based environment and you are passionate about solving challenging technical problems, we look forward to hearing from you! JumpCloud® is an incredible place to share and grow your expertise! You’ll work with amazing talent across each department who are passionate about our mission. We’re out of the box thinkers, so your unique ideas and approaches for conceiving a product and/or feature will be welcome. You’ll have a voice in the organization as you work with a seasoned executive team, a supportive board and in a proven market that our customers are excited about.

One of JumpCloud®’s three core values is to “Build Connections.” To us that means creating “ human connection with each other regardless of our backgrounds, orientations, geographies, religions, languages, gender, race, etc. We care deeply about the people that we work with and want to see everyone succeed.” - Rajat Bhargava, CEO

Please submit your résumé and brief explanation about yourself and why you would be a good fit for JumpCloud®.  Please note JumpCloud® is not accepting third party resumes at this time.

JumpCloud® is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status.

Scam Notice:

Please be aware that there are individuals and organizations that may attempt to scam job seekers by offering fraudulent employment opportunities in the name of JumpCloud. These scams may involve fake job postings, unsolicited emails, or messages claiming to be from our recruiters or hiring managers. Please note that JumpCloud will never ask for any personal account information, such as credit card details or bank account numbers, during the recruitment process. Additionally, JumpCloud will never send you a check for any equipment prior to employment.

All communication related to interviews and offers from our recruiters and hiring managers will come from official company email addresses (@jumpcloud.com) and will never ask for any payment, fee to be paid or purchases to be made by the job seeker. If you are contacted by anyone claiming to represent JumpCloud and you are unsure of their authenticity, please do not provide any personal/financial information and contact us immediately at [email protected] with the subject line “Scam Notice”

#LI-Remote #BI-Remote

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, transcribing or summarizing interviews, and assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment in hiring decisions, which are ultimately made by humans. Please see our Privacy Policy (https://jumpcloud.com/privacy) for more information about our personal data practices.
